prose:
The Fukui reactivity analysis for ferrocene has been performed using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase.

**Fukui Reactivity Analysis** — GFN2-xTB (xtb), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: built from user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz`. SCF converged.

The most electrophilic site is Iron (Fe) at atom index 10 (1-based label 11), with a Fukui f+ value of 0.22885. The most nucleophilic site is Iron (Fe) at atom index 10 (1-based label 11), with a Fukui f- value of 0.25938.

A plot of the Fukui indices per atom has been generated and saved to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260704-052202_ferrocene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
